title: Edge-Anchored GPS Arrows
notes: The GPS arrow endpoint circle has been removed from both templates and PDF exports.
Arrowheads now stop at the nearest edge of the tagged hole instead of covering the center data.
As a callout box is moved, its arrow tip automatically travels around the hole perimeter.
Compact coordinate-only callout boxes and their expanded invisible drag targets remain unchanged.
The m38.19 blank-GPS cleanup and m38.18 Quick Fill targeting fix remain included.
